mission.title: opentofu: State Encryption Documentation and Partial Implementation
mission.description:
This pull request includes 2 main parts of the implementation.

Firstly it contains a large document (`docs/state_encryption.md`) which we intend to keep up to date as a living design document for the intentions behind the implementation. 

Secondly, it contains an initial draft of the library component and a basic prototype implementation. 

This does **not** change the behavior of OpenTofu.

This draft has been made because we are seeking reviews on this pull request. However we would like to ask people to review this from 3 perspectives.

- Review this as an implementer of a `KeyProvider` or `Method`
- Review this as an end-user consumer of the new `encryption` block in OpenTofu Configuration
- Review this as a consumer of the library, either OpenTofu or another project.

Resolves #1030 

## Target Release

1.7.0

resolution.summary: Reminder for the PR assignee: If this is a user-visible change, please update the changelog as part of the PR.
steps: Review the issue discussion for context
Apply the fix from the linked pull request
